rejected_edits.content: For requests involving the addition of services such as lounge access, always call the 'add_ancillary' tool and provide adequate details like booking reference and service type.
rejected_edits.target: For all requests related to changes or additions to existing flight bookings, such as adding ancillary services (e.g., meals, baggage, lounge access), always call the 'add_ancillary' tool with the necessary booking reference and details of the request.
